# Coda

> Coda is a self-hosted source breakdown workspace with configurable hierarchy levels, typed fields, PDF page references, and project-scoped integrations.

## Primary documentation

- [Coda overview](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/): Documentation entry point and product scope.
- [External REST API](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/external-api/): Authentication, response format, pagination, concurrency, uploads, activity, and exports.
- [OpenAPI 3.1](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/openapi.json): Machine-readable external API contract.
- [MCP server](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/mcp/): Project-scoped MCP setup, tools, and operational guidance.
- [Architecture](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/architecture/): Runtime boundaries, data flow, project model, and source-document lifecycle.
- [Security model](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/security/): Sessions, bearer credentials, permissions, storage, networking, and logging.
- [Deployment and operations](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/operations/): Compose deployment, health, backup, restore, and upgrade guidance.
- [Deploy with Coolify](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/coolify/): Coolify quickstart, full-stack and app-only topologies, trusted-proxy boundary, and validation matrix.
- [Condensed LLM reference](https://kinetik-gg.github.io/coda-docs/llm/): Integration facts and important invariants.

## Repository references

- [Contributor map](https://github.com/kinetik-gg/coda/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Repository layout, common commands, and change locations.
- [Release history](https://github.com/kinetik-gg/coda/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Versioned user-facing changes.
- [Security policy](https://github.com/kinetik-gg/coda/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Private vulnerability reporting policy.
